tools.name: google_search_drive_files
tools.description: Search Google Drive files visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

tools.name: google_create_drive_text_file
tools.description: Create a new app-owned plain/text-like file in Google Drive using this Slack user's connected Google account. Do not use this to create Google Docs, Sheets, or Slides; use dedicated tools for those file types.

text.description: Text body to write into the file. Defaults to an empty text file.

mimeType.description: Optional non-Google-Workspace MIME type. Defaults to text/plain.

tools.name: google_get_drive_file
tools.description: Read Google Drive file metadata and, by default, text content for files accessible to the connected Google account and granted Drive scopes. Drive metadata search may find files whose content cannot be read or edited if the stored Google connection lacks the required Drive scope or the file is not shared with the connected account.

includeContent.description: Whether to include exported/downloaded text content. Defaults to true.

tools.name: google_append_to_drive_text_file
tools.description: Append text to a Google Drive text file accessible to the connected Google account and granted Drive scopes by reading existing content then replacing it.

mimeType.description: Optional MIME type. Defaults to text/plain.

tools.name: google_search_calendar_events
tools.description: Search upcoming Google Calendar events visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

timeMin.description: Optional RFC3339 lower bound; defaults to now

tools.name: google_search_mail_messages
tools.description: Search Gmail messages visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

tools.name: google_slides_search_presentations
tools.description: Search Google Slides presentations visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

tools.name: google_slides_get_presentation
tools.description: Read sanitized structure, slide text, layout IDs, and placeholder metadata from a Google Slides presentation.

includeSlides.description: Whether to include slide content. Defaults to true.

tools.name: google_slides_probe_template
tools.description: Probe a Google Slides presentation's layouts and placeholders into a manifest for future deterministic slide rendering.

presentationId.description: Google Slides presentation ID to inspect as a template.

tools.name: google_slides_copy_presentation
tools.description: Copy an existing Google Slides presentation into a new presentation using the connected Google account. Use this for explicit user requests to create a new deck from a template; it does not edit slide contents.

tools.name: google_slides_create_slide
tools.description: Create a new slide in an existing Google Slides presentation, optionally from a layout or predefined layout, and optionally fill placeholders on the created slide. Use this for explicit user requests to add a slide to a deck.

presentationId.description: Google Slides presentation ID to edit.

objectId.description: Optional caller-supplied object ID for the new slide.

insertionIndex.description: Optional zero-based insertion index. Use 2 to create slide 3.

layoutObjectId.description: Optional layout object ID from google_slides_get_presentation or google_slides_probe_template.

predefinedLayout.description: Optional Google predefined layout such as TITLE_AND_BODY or TITLE_AND_TWO_COLUMNS.

replacements.description: Optional placeholder text replacements to apply to the created slide.

placeholderType.description: Google Slides placeholder type such as TITLE, SUBTITLE, BODY, CENTERED_TITLE, or SLIDE_NUMBER.

text.description: Text to place into the placeholder.

index.description: Optional placeholder index when a slide has multiple placeholders of the same type.

tools.name: google_slides_fill_placeholders
tools.description: Fill text placeholders on an existing Google Slides presentation slide. When slideObjectId is omitted, Burble chooses the slide that best matches the requested placeholders. Use for explicit user requests to set title, subtitle, body, or similar placeholder text in a deck.

presentationId.description: Google Slides presentation ID to edit.

slideObjectId.description: Optional slide object ID. If omitted, Burble chooses the slide that best matches the requested placeholders.

placeholderType.description: Google Slides placeholder type such as TITLE, SUBTITLE, BODY, CENTERED_TITLE, or SLIDE_NUMBER.

text.description: Text to place into the placeholder.

index.description: Optional placeholder index when a slide has multiple placeholders of the same type.

tools.name: google_analytics_list_properties
tools.description: List Google Analytics accounts and GA4 properties visible to this Slack user's connected Google account.

tools.name: google_analytics_get_metadata
tools.description: List available Google Analytics dimensions and metrics for a GA4 property, optionally filtered by search terms.

propertyId.description: GA4 property ID, either numeric or properties/{id}.

tools.name: google_analytics_run_report
tools.description: Run a read-only GA4 report for a Google Analytics property using selected dimensions, metrics, and a date range of at most 366 days.

propertyId.description: GA4 property ID, either numeric or properties/{id}.

metrics.description: GA4 metric API names, such as activeUsers or sessions.

dimensions.description: Optional GA4 dimension API names, such as country or date.
